prompt: A highly detailed realistic scene representing overfitting, a student memorizing identical answers but failing a slightly different test, cinematic lighting, ultra high resolution, 2048x2048, no text, no diagrams, painted in the style of Renaissance art with dramatic lighting and balanced composition
tradition_approach: Use balanced composition, realistic human figures, and dramatic chiaroscuro lighting to depict a student memorizing rigid patterns but failing to adapt
metaphor: A student memorizes exact examples but cannot generalize to new situations
